title: spinoliva ilicifolia subsp. ilicifolia
intro: Spinoliva ilicifolia subsp. ilicifolia, also known as the holly-leaved spinoliva, is a plant species in the family Solanaceae, characterized by its small, oval-shaped leaves and red or yellow flowers. The medicinal properties of Spinoliva ilicifolia subsp. ilicifolia include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of this plant are said to include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers, as well as its anti-diabetic properties. Herbal preparations of Spinoliva ilicifolia subsp. ilicifolia typically involve drying and processing the leaves and flowers to create teas, tinctures, and capsules that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
